rankings.title: The Minimum Wage as a Hidden Tax on Elderly Care: National Living Wage Bite and Care Home Closures in England
conditions: credible “first stage” showing wage pass-through in care
explicitly handling adult social care funding + COVID period robustness

rankings.title: Empty Homes, Full Wallets? Council Tax Premiums and Housing Reactivation in England
conditions: a serious strategy for endogenous adoption—at minimum strong lead tests
ideally a border/pair design or IV-like variation

pre-2019 primary window to avoid COVID
